headline: US-Iran framework accord to be signed at Switzerland's Buergenstock resort Friday
summary: Bern confirms the US-Iran memorandum of understanding will be signed at the Buergenstock above Lake Lucerne on Friday.

headline: Cassis underscores Swiss mediator role in US-Iran framework
summary: Foreign minister Cassis highlights Switzerland's good-offices and protecting-power role in brokering the US-Iran deal.

headline: Vaud Grand Conseil seeks power to suspend or remove cantonal ministers
summary: Vaud's cantonal parliament advances a measure to suspend or destitute members of the Conseil d'Etat.

headline: Switzerland and Europe seek sovereign alternatives to US AI after Anthropic shock
summary: Le Temps reports a scramble for digital sovereignty after dependence on US AI providers is called harmful.

headline: Swiss court convicts man for hate mail to BAG chief Anne Levy
summary: A 62-year-old is convicted for threatening, hateful messages to the federal health office director.

headline: EU finalises new air-passenger rights on hand luggage and delay compensation
summary: EU reforms to cabin-baggage and delay-compensation rules flow to Swiss travellers via the bilateral air agreement.

headline: G7 Evian agrees common position to supply Ukraine additional air defense
summary: G7 leaders at Evian agree to provide Ukraine more air-defense capability as Macron presses Trump to stay engaged.

headline: US-Iran memorandum of understanding to end the Gulf war
summary: Washington and Tehran agree an MoU to end the conflict that began 28 Feb with US-Israeli strikes on Iran.

headline: FBI says it foiled planned attacks targeting White House UFC event
summary: FBI announces it disrupted a plot aimed at a UFC event planned at the White House.

headline: South Africa marks 50 years since the Soweto uprising
summary: South Africa observes Youth Day, 50 years after the 16 June 1976 Soweto student protests against apartheid.

headline: CISA KEV adds LiteSpeed cPanel symlink and Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager path traversal
summary: CISA adds CVE-2026-54420 and CVE-2026-20262 to the KEV catalog on 15 June.

headline: galaxy_ng command injection CVE-2026-12398 in legacy role import
summary: do_git_checkout interpolates unsanitized input enabling command injection in galaxy_ng, CVSS 7.5.

headline: Zyxel GS1900 switch CGI stack buffer overflow CVE-2026-7273
summary: Stack-based buffer overflow in Zyxel GS1900-48HPv2 CGI, CVSS 8.8.

headline: WP Review Slider Pro WordPress plugin unauthenticated SQL injection cluster
summary: CVE-2026-8443/8444 unauth SQLi and CVE-2026-8442 arbitrary file deletion in WP Review Slider Pro.

headline: Nemotron 3 Ultra technical report: open MoE hybrid Mamba-Transformer
summary: 550B/55B-active open MoE hybrid Mamba-Attention model for agentic, long-context workloads.

headline: Rational Sparse Autoencoder for mechanistic interpretability
summary: SAE with learnable rational encoder nonlinearities for better feature disentanglement.

headline: Ling and Ring 2.6: efficient instant agentic intelligence at trillion-parameter scale
summary: Technical report on trillion-parameter models balancing reasoning quality and low latency.

headline: Zero-order parameter-free optimization for LMO-based fine-tuning
summary: Memory-efficient zeroth-order, learning-rate-free method for fine-tuning large models.

headline: OSGuard: a benchmark for safety in computer-use agents
summary: Benchmark scoring unsafe actions by computer-use agents separately from task success.

headline: Diffusion Flow Matching: dimension-improved KL bounds and Wasserstein guarantees
summary: Tighter convergence theory for diffusion flow-matching generative models.
